case_title: BENITO MONTES NEGRETTE VS. JESUS CENDEJAS GONZALEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO APR-05-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-08-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $110) SERVED FEB-03-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MOREL, ISMAEL
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR A SPANISH INTERPRETER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2022 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO APR-28-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BENITO MONTES NEGRETTE IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS. DEFENDANT JESUS CENDEJAS GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ISMEL MOREL IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS SPANISH INTREPRETER. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MONTES BEGRETTE IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA. DEFENDANT JESUS CENDEJAS GONZALEZ IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ISMAEL MOREL IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS THAT VENUE IS IMPROPER AND DISMISSES THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO FILE IN ALAMEDA COUNTY. PROOF OF SERVICE(S) ARE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE; VENUE IS IMPROPER.
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY MONTES NEGRETTE, BENITO
